scratchpad.reasoning: Falta información sobre el nivel actual de conocimiento en cocina italiana para planificar adecuadamente el aprendizaje.
Se necesita definir el criterio de éxito para el menú simple para medir el progreso.

The plan has a strong structure and aligns with the goal, but lacks sufficient specificity and measurable milestones. The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu is too abrupt, and the plan assumes too much without considering the user’s limited time and beginner level. These issues can be resolved with more detailed planning and incremental phases.

[warning/progression] The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu may be too abrupt. The user may not have enough time to internalize the techniques and build confidence before attempting a full menu.

[warning/feasibility] The plan assumes the user will have the time and resources to cook 5 pasta recipes and 5 sauces in 4 weeks, which may be unrealistic given the user’s limited time and lack of prior experience.

El plan no paso la revision final de calidad (score: 80/100, verdict: approve). The plan has a strong structure and aligns with the goal, but lacks sufficient specificity and measurable milestones. minimumViable.description: Version minima de Estudiar ingredientes y técnicas básicas

package.summary_esAR: Este plan convierte "Quiero aprender cocina italiana, especialmente pastas y salsas, y poder cocinar un menu simple en 3 meses." en 6 bloques concretos para esta semana. Lo organizamos en 3 etapas a lo largo de 12 semanas para que no quieras hacer todo de golpe. El puntaje de calidad actual es 0/100. Ojo: hay 3 advertencias para mirar con calma. El paquete quedo bloqueado porque todavia no queda coherente con el pedido original.
implementationIntentions: Si llega lunes a las 08:30, entonces hago Estudiar ingredientes y técnicas básicas durante 30 minutos.
Si llega martes a las 21:30, entonces hago Cocinar para amigos o familiares durante 45 minutos.
Si llega miércoles a las 19:30, entonces hago Hacer una receta nueva cada semana durante 60 minutos.
Si llega sábado a las 13:00, entonces hago Cocinar para amigos o familiares durante 45 minutos.
warnings: El paquete no comparte suficientes señales con el pedido original y parece responder a otro objetivo.
El plan no reutiliza señales criticas del intake: timeframe.
Este paquete quedo bloqueado y no conviene usarlo todavia.

qualityIssues.message: El paquete no comparte suficientes señales con el pedido original y parece responder a otro objetivo.
El plan no reutiliza señales criticas del intake: timeframe.

[warning/specificity] The milestones are not sufficiently detailed or measurable at a strategic level. For example, 'replicar 5 recetas de pasta básica' is too vague without defining what constitutes a 'básica' recipe or how to measure replication success.

[warning/progression] The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu may be too abrupt. The user may not have enough time to internalize the techniques and build confidence before attempting a full menu.

[warning/feasibility] The plan assumes the user will have the time and resources to cook 5 pasta recipes and 5 sauces in 4 weeks, which may be unrealistic given the user’s limited time and lack of prior experience.

El plan no paso la revision final de calidad (score: 80/100, verdict: approve). The plan has a strong structure and aligns with the goal, but lacks sufficient specificity and measurable milestones. The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu is too abrupt, and the plan assumes too much without considering the user’s limited time and beginner level. These issues can be resolved with more detailed planning and incremental phases.

shouldFix.message: The milestones are not sufficiently detailed or measurable at a strategic level. For example, 'replicar 5 recetas de pasta básica' is too vague without defining what constitutes a 'básica' recipe or how to measure replication success.
shouldFix.suggestion: Define specific criteria for what constitutes a 'básica' recipe and include measurable indicators such as recipe accuracy, consistency, and taste feedback.

shouldFix.message: The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu may be too abrupt. The user may not have enough time to internalize the techniques and build confidence before attempting a full menu.
shouldFix.suggestion: Add a transitional phase between the second and third phase to allow for more practice with combining elements and building confidence in menu creation.

minimumViable.description: Version minima de Estudiar ingredientes y técnicas básicas

package.summary_esAR: Este plan convierte "Quiero aprender cocina italiana, especialmente pastas y salsas, y poder cocinar un menu simple en 3 meses." en 6 bloques concretos para esta semana. Lo organizamos en 3 etapas a lo largo de 12 semanas para que no quieras hacer todo de golpe. El puntaje de calidad actual es 0/100. Ojo: hay 3 advertencias para mirar con calma. El paquete quedo bloqueado porque todavia no queda coherente con el pedido original.
implementationIntentions: Si llega lunes a las 08:30, entonces hago Estudiar ingredientes y técnicas básicas durante 30 minutos.
Si llega martes a las 21:30, entonces hago Cocinar para amigos o familiares durante 45 minutos.
Si llega miércoles a las 19:30, entonces hago Hacer una receta nueva cada semana durante 60 minutos.
Si llega sábado a las 13:00, entonces hago Cocinar para amigos o familiares durante 45 minutos.
warnings: El paquete no comparte suficientes señales con el pedido original y parece responder a otro objetivo.
El plan no reutiliza señales criticas del intake: timeframe.
Este paquete quedo bloqueado y no conviene usarlo todavia.

qualityIssues.message: El paquete no comparte suficientes señales con el pedido original y parece responder a otro objetivo.
El plan no reutiliza señales criticas del intake: timeframe.

[warning/specificity] The milestones are not sufficiently detailed or measurable at a strategic level. For example, 'replicar 5 recetas de pasta básica' is too vague without defining what constitutes a 'básica' recipe or how to measure replication success.

[warning/progression] The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu may be too abrupt. The user may not have enough time to internalize the techniques and build confidence before attempting a full menu.

[warning/feasibility] The plan assumes the user will have the time and resources to cook 5 pasta recipes and 5 sauces in 4 weeks, which may be unrealistic given the user’s limited time and lack of prior experience.

El plan no paso la revision final de calidad (score: 80/100, verdict: approve). The plan has a strong structure and aligns with the goal, but lacks sufficient specificity and measurable milestones. The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu is too abrupt, and the plan assumes too much without considering the user’s limited time and beginner level. These issues can be resolved with more detailed planning and incremental phases.

reasoningTrace.result: Goal: I want to learn Italian cooking, specifically pasta and sauces, and be able to cook a simple menu within 3 months., confidence: 0.9

reasoningTrace.reasoning: Falta información sobre el nivel actual de conocimiento en cocina italiana para planificar adecuadamente el aprendizaje.
Se necesita definir el criterio de éxito para el menú simple para medir el progreso.

The plan has a strong structure and aligns with the goal, but lacks sufficient specificity and measurable milestones. The progression from replicating recipes to creating a full menu is too abrupt, and the plan assumes too much without considering the user’s limited time and beginner level. These issues can be resolved with more detailed planning and incremental phases.
